meta.wersja: v2 (2026-07-17) — przebudowa po analizie porównawczej: PROCES nie POZA, mechanizm na ekranie, krzywa emocji, audio z dynamiką

scenes.emotion: skeptical deadpan, one raised eyebrow, unconvinced look straight into camera
scenes.frame_brief: Medium selfie shot: the woman holds the pink curler loosely in one hand at chest height, straight flat hair, slightly messy flyaway strands, worn beige tee, bathroom with waffle curtain, a few bottles cluttering the shelf behind, uneven window light
EXTREME close-up, face fills entire frame: wide open eyes, open mouth, shocked 'whoa' expression, slight motion blur, handheld feel
scenes.motion: quick handheld jolt, she blinks once, mouth stays open in disbelief

scenes.emotion: focused, concentrating, slight frown, eyes ON THE DEVICE not camera
scenes.frame_brief: Medium-close: BOTH hands working — one holds the pink curler against the side of her head, the other hand feeds a strand of straight hair into the crown of prongs, visible hair tension, gaze at the device, straight hair everywhere

scenes.frame_brief_first: MACRO shot filling the frame: the curler's crown chamber with a strand of straight hair entering the intake slot, rose-gold barrel visible, shallow depth of field, bathroom bokeh
scenes.frame_brief_last: SAME macro framing: the strand now fully wound around the rose-gold barrel inside the chamber, coiled tightly
scenes.motion: the hair strand is drawn in and winds around the rotating barrel, smooth mechanical rotation, macro detail
scenes.audio_note: SUSPENS: muzyka przycicha, tylko delikatny ambient

scenes.emotion: tense anticipation, biting lip slightly, eyes fixed on the device at her head
scenes.frame_brief: Medium shot: device held at her head with hair inside the chamber, her gaze sideways AT the device, hand steady, straight hair on the other side

scenes.frame_brief_first: Medium-close: the curler held at her head, hair wound inside the chamber, her face partially visible watching it
scenes.frame_brief_last: SAME framing: the device pulled away 20cm from the head, a fresh bouncy spiral curl hangs free where the strand was, curl catching the light
scenes.motion: she pulls the device away smoothly and a formed spiral curl springs out and bounces once

scenes.emotion: GENUINE SURPRISE bursting into delighted laughter, eyes wide then crinkling, head tilts back slightly
scenes.frame_brief: Medium-close selfie: she holds the fresh single spiral curl between fingers showing it to camera, one perfect curl on otherwise straight hair, genuine open-mouth laugh

scenes.emotion: proud, animated, talking fast with excitement, glancing between camera and device
scenes.frame_brief: Medium shot: ASYMMETRIC hair — right side full of spiral curls, left side still straight and flat; she feeds another strand into the device with the second hand, mid-process energy
scenes.vo_pl: Robię tak pasmo po paśmie... zero wprawy, zero parzenia palców.

scenes.frame_brief: Close shot: her index finger POINTS at the chamber of the curler where hair is visibly wound inside, asymmetric curls behind, she is slightly out of focus, device sharp
scenes.motion: finger taps toward the chamber, hair rotates slightly inside, subtle handheld drift

scenes.frame_brief: Medium shot: FULL head of bouncy spiral curls now, both hands buried in the curls mid-shake, joyful energy, mouth open in a laugh, curls in motion blur
scenes.motion: she shakes and tousles her curls with both hands, hair bounces with volume and spring, joyful, handheld camera

scenes.emotion: SECOND SHOCK: wide eyes, open mouth 'O', looking at her own reflection/phone then to camera, disbelief that it still holds
scenes.frame_brief: Bedroom mirror selfie with phone (floral case, no brand): full curls still perfectly bouncy, different room = time passed, warm evening light, the curler standing on the vanity in front
scenes.vo_pl: [gasp] Kilka godzin później... i one dalej się trzymają!

scenes.emotion: warm confident smile, direct eye contact, quick and energetic delivery
scenes.frame_brief: Medium-close in bedroom: she holds the pink curler up next to her curls (product hero but ALIVE — she taps it once), pink cord visible

consistency.twarz: kanoniczna z refs/face-ref.png (brązowe oczy, okrągła twarz, gęstsze brwi, bez piegów)
consistency.kabel: różowy kabel WIDOCZNY we wszystkich scenach z urządzeniem
consistency.wlosy_stany: h1-mech1: proste płaskie | wait-react: proste + JEDEN lok | prog-mech2: ASYMETRIA pół na pół | shake-cta: pełne loki
consistency.sceneria: łazienka z clutterem (butelki na półce) -> mirror/cta: sypialnia
consistency.ubranie: sprany beżowy oversize tee przez całość
